title: Hard Hat ABS, Safety Helmet with Ventilation Holes and Adjustable Head Band, EN 397 Approved Work Helmet, Ideal for Industrial & Construction
features: Low profile, sleek, modern design that allows for uninterrupted upward vision. Made of high impact and penetration resistant ABS outer shell, lightweight and strong.
Six-point webbing suspension system conforms to the shape of head. One-Finger Adjustment Design is easier to access and fits most people better.
Sliding breathable vent system on back of the helmet provides ultimate adaptability with better cooling, more suitable and comfortable in hot or dry weather.
Special Side Slots Design ensures safety hardhats to install hearing protection, face shield and headlamp by DIY easily, which enables more protections in custruction, mining.
Ideal for height and scaffolding work in construction, manufacturing, utilities and any trade that requires general head protection.
description: Product Description GUARDLEAD W1000 Construction hard hats made of high impact ABS material, safety helmet approved with CE,EN 397. Features a quick release buckle. Breakway chinstraps protect the wearer in the case of hooking . The force for chin straps to loosen or break must be between 150 N and 250 N. -Chin straps that loosen or break at forces less than 150 N would be disqualified as they are not strong enough. -Chin straps that fail to loosen or break at forces greater than 250 N are also disqualified as they may pose hazards Introducing the GUARDLEAD Safety Hard Hat - Designed for Comfort and Protection on the Job Features - Professional craftsmanship keeps this safety helmet in perfect shape for many years - A short peak design gives you maximum visibility and view range - Ventilation for Breathable and Cool in Summer - Six-point ratchet suspension for excellent impact absorption - Side Slot for Mounting Headlamp,Face Shield, Ear Muffs - Achieve the perfect fit for head sizes 6.5-8 / 21in-25in / 53cm-64cm Stay Cool with Advanced Ventilation: Our vented hard hat features six sliding shutters, offering customizable airflow and temperature control to keep you comfortable in any climate - from sweltering summer days to chilly winter months. Invest in your safety and comfort with the GUARDLEAD CE Approved Safety Hard Hat. Experience the ultimate in worksite protection, designed specifically for the challenges of the modern construction environment. Wear it and tackle your next project with confidence!
